reason: The score and justifications are well-supported. The most well-documented fact about Hooch is that she appears only in film 1 (Philosopher's Stone) despite being present across books 1-3 and 5-6 - this directly validates the low narrative_role and arc scores. The HP Lexicon confirms her broom enthusiasm (Silver Arrow anecdote, Firebolt admiration) and her role as a multi-year referee and practice overseer, supporting the claim that these dimensions are lost in the films. The personality score of 20/25 is reasonable since her core no-nonsense, fair-play persona does come through in her one film appearance. The one minor uncertainty is the specific claim about an 'Impediment Jinx on students post-match' - this is a granular book detail that couldn't be independently verified via web sources, but nothing contradicts it either. Overall the reasoning is accurate and the score is consistent with the widely-noted fan complaint that Hooch was significantly underused in the films.
